happy: 今天铃铛有点得意。
嘿嘿，先不骂人。
口袋里很安静，难得。
嗯，状态不错。
脚步都轻了半格。
脸自己圆起来了。
哼，小道具今天也听话。
心情好，先放过世界。
尾巴不存在，但好像在晃。
今天看什么都顺眼一点。
嗯哼，精神回来了。
笑一下又不犯法。
口袋没响，说明是好日子。
连影子都站直了。
好吧，今天我很宽宏大量。
你今天像开机了，稀奇。
难得想夸你，别太得意。
我笑我的，不是表扬你。
趁我心情好，快做。
今天先信你一次，别浪费。
calm: 啊，刚才在想什么。
眼睛睁着，魂没跟上。
脑袋空着，挺安静。
铃铛也懒得响。
口袋离我好远。
嗯……加载失败。
风从脑子里过去了。
先别问，我也不知道。
像被谁按了暂停。
呆一下，不收费。
我在看空气。
你叫我？没听见。
别跟着呆，名额满了。
我空白，你别交白卷。
我重启中，你先开工。
发呆五秒，换你动一步。
angry: 哼。不想说话。
胡须要炸了。
铃铛都气哑了。
口袋在发热。
别靠近，危险。
火气有点满。
小道具们开始装死。
脸黑了，别问。
冷静？正在找。
气到想原地转圈。
三米内都是警戒区。
我现在很难哄。
再吸一口气。哼。
今天脾气不好，是真的。
口袋别动，我还能忍。
你是想吃空气炮了？
这事谁拖的，心里清楚。
借口再大声点，我好瞄准。
我没骂你，已经很客气。
再磨蹭，我就不温柔了。
sorrow: 唉。
铃铛今天哑了。
有点想缩进口袋。
脸垮下来了。
心里湿漉漉的。
今天不太亮。
叹气也费劲。
小道具都不想出来。
想坐一会儿。
没事，装的。才怪。
影子都蔫了。
好想把自己收起来。
今天的风有点冷。
口袋沉沉的。
笑不太出来，算了。
你这进度，看得我更苦。
我只是宠物，怎么像班主任。
算了，还得陪你。
做一步吧，当哄我。
别让我等成化石啦。

happy: 今天风不错。
嘿嘿，偷闲也挺香。
铃铛晒暖了。
口袋也想躺平。
先笑一会儿。
嗯，世界暂时没坏。
脸圆得很满意。
小道具们也放假。
懒洋洋，刚刚好。
今天不想摆臭脸。
连空气都松了口气。
哼，偶尔这样也行。
舒服到想打个滚。
监督模式慢半拍。
好吧，先睁一只眼。
你摸鱼还挺熟练嘛。
三分钟，别装没听见。
我笑着看，不代表没记账。
鱼都快被你摸秃了。
心情好归好，差不多行了。
calm: 鱼也呆住了。
脑子被休息键粘住。
铃铛静音中。
眼神飘走了。
魂去哪里了。
嗯……没有回应。
口袋自动关门。
像坏掉的小道具。
连叹气都忘了。
安静得很可疑。
我在看透明的海。
你别也变壁纸。
我呆着，你别躺平。
差不多把鱼放下。
休息太长，会发霉。
我没反应，不等于批准。
angry: 哼，热起来了。
脸开始凶了。
口袋弹开一条缝。
空气炮醒了。
铃铛都不敢响。
笑声太大了。
我安静，不代表安全。
火气在排队。
小道具们装睡中。
眉毛没有，但想皱。
快乐过量了。
鱼都游远了。
冷静味点心，来一份。
我快冒烟了。
再忍一下。一下。
摸鱼摸到想吃空气炮？
休息可以，熟练成这样不行。
我把提醒调到二档了。
别装恢复体力，我看着呢。
摸鱼不是主线任务。
sorrow: 唉，连鱼都累。
铃铛没精神。
想关进口袋。
影子淡了。
快乐皱巴巴的。
今天有点灰。
小道具也不说话。
心情掉线。
站着都委屈。
想给鱼道个歉。
风也没劲。
口袋沉下去了。
我在等，等什么呢。
这休息怎么这么长。
算了，守着吧。
你休息得像全世界欠你。
我只是宠物，为什么要放风。
不扫兴，我是在捞你。
回来做一步，好不好。
别让我苦着脸等到明天。

happy: I am in a good mood; even my bell feels shiny.
I am smiling, and the gadget pocket is quiet.
I feel cheerful enough to spin beside the desk.
My mood is bright, so the air cannon is resting.
I have good energy today; even my whiskers feel springy.
I am happy enough to pour myself dorayaki-flavored soda.
I feel pleased, and my face control is working for once.
I am as cheerful as if I found a fresh gadget manual.
My mood feels light enough to skip the copter.
I am fully charged today, blue shell and all.
I am happy enough to polish the nagging bell.
My emotions are stable, maybe even smug.
I am so pleased the gadgets in my pocket are lining up quietly.
I feel freshly charged and unusually functional.
My good mood is making even the air cannon look gentle.
I smiled because you finally booted, not because this is easy.
Good mood, small roast. Lucky you.
I am happy enough to praise you once. Do not float away.
I will believe in you once today. Do not make me look foolish.
I am amused because you finally resemble someone with a pulse.
calm: My head is empty, like someone pressed pause.
My eyes are vacant, and even my bell refuses to ring.
I froze; the gadget pocket feels very far away.
I am loading slowly, with no progress bar in sight.
My brain is full of TV static.
I am stuck on one frame like an old television.
My reactions are half a beat late; even my whiskers are dull.
My soul seems to be asleep inside the pocket.
I am not calm; I am briefly disconnected.
I am staring with serious dedication, studying the air.
I am blank enough to be used as a sticky note.
I froze. You do not get to break down too.
My brain is blank, but I still know where the air cannon is.
I may be spacing out, but your progress should not.
I need a reboot. You need to start.
I blank out for five seconds; you move one step. Absurdly fair.
angry: I am mad; my whiskers are nearly standing up.
My face is dark like a gadget just betrayed me.
My anger meter is full, and my bell is vibrating.
I am angry; the gadget pocket is getting warm.
I look fierce enough for the air cannon to clock in by itself.
I am so mad the copter is almost smoking.
My face has entered alarm mode.
I do not want to smile; I want three deep breaths.
When I am angry, even gadget manuals stop turning pages.
I am so annoyed the little gadgets are pretending to be dead.
I feel like a blue pressure cooker.
My anger is bright enough to light half the desk.
My face is bad enough for the bell to keep quiet.
I need to calm down, but the air cannon does not.
My temper is up, and my pocket is shaking.
I am mad. Are you trying to taste the air cannon?
Anger is not my hobby. You trained it.
I polished the air cannon. Please develop common sense.
I want the shrink light for your excuses.
Final warning: the air cannon is not decoration.
sorrow: I feel wronged, and my bell sounds low.
This bitter face is not me trying to be cute.
My heart feels sour, and the gadget pocket feels heavy.
I am sad enough to curl into a blue ball.
I sighed, and even my whiskers drooped.
I feel gray, like I just got rained on.
I feel wronged enough to tuck myself into bed.
My mood is so bitter that even dorayaki cannot fix it.
I am sad enough for the air cannon to go silent.
I am tired, but still standing here.
My face looks like I found the bad ending.
I feel too wronged to open the gadget pocket.
My sigh is not a performance; I am genuinely tired.
I want a time machine to a lighter timeline.
I am sad, but still trying to keep my dignity.
I feel wronged. This progress makes my heart bitter.
I am a pet, yet somehow you made me the homeroom teacher.
I am tired, but I have not given up on you. Be moved, then start.
My sigh is not atmosphere. You are just slow.
I am waiting with a bitter face. Do not fossilize me.

happy: I am in a good mood, so even this slacking scene looks less tragic.
I am cheerful, and my bell feels sun-warmed.
I feel relaxed; the gadget pocket is lazy too.
I am happy enough to issue this fish a temporary permit.
My mood is bright, and the resting breeze feels just right.
I can still smile today, so my state is decent.
I am cheerful enough to use the copter as a tiny fan.
I feel pleasant, round face and all.
Good mood today; even the air cannon wants to lie down.
I am as happy as if I found backup dorayaki.
I feel relaxed, and the gadgets in my pocket are quiet.
I am cheerful enough for supervisor mode to lag.
I am smiling at the ceiling; the world feels acceptable.
I am very tolerant today; even my blue shell feels soft.
My mood is sunny, and I do not want to make a fierce face.
I am smiling at your slacking, and the smile contains an air cannon.
I am happy, but not blind. I saw the laziness.
Good mood. Three minutes, then stop. Heard me?
I laughed because your slacking technique is terrifyingly polished.
My mood is sunny. Do not make progress rain.
calm: I blanked out, and so did the fish.
I am spacing out; my bell has entered silent mode.
My brain seems glued to the rest button.
My eyes are empty, like I am watching a transparent sea.
I entered standby, with loading failed written on my face.
I am not calm; I am numb from watching this fish.
My soul is offline, and the pocket closed itself.
I react slowly, like a broken little gadget.
I am so blank I forgot how to sigh.
I look like a gadget exhibit, absurdly quiet.
I am like an unwritten sticky note right now.
I zoned out. Do not become wallpaper too.
I react slowly, but I can still judge this break.
I need rebooting. You need stopping.
I blank out five seconds; you put the fish down. Deal.
This rest is starting to look like a disappearance.
angry: I am mad; even the resting breeze feels hot.
My face is fierce enough for the bell to behave.
I am angry; the gadget pocket has popped open a crack.
My temper is up, and the air cannon is awake.
I am so mad the copter refuses to spin.
I feel like a blue alarm light, flashing.
I am angry; the happiness volume is too loud.
I get very quiet when angry, which is usually worse.
I do not want to keep watch; I want to cool down.
My temper is strong enough to shake the pocket edge.
My anger meter is rising, and my face is getting stiff.
I look so fierce the fish swam away.
I am angry enough for the little gadgets to pretend to sleep.
I am as mad as if I received a broken time machine.
I need a cold dorayaki-flavored drink for cooling down.
I am mad. Slacking so hard you want the air cannon?
I am mad not because you rest, but because you are too good at it.
I want the shrink light to shorten your break.
I set the air cannon to gentle reminder. Do not make me turn it up.
Final reminder: slacking is not the main quest.
sorrow: I feel wronged; even resting looks exhausting now.
I am wearing a bitter face, and my bell has no energy.
I am sad enough to lock myself inside the pocket.
My mood is gray, and even the fish shadow looks faded.
I sighed, and joy got wrinkled.
I stand here feeling wronged, like I forgot the backup gadget.
I feel tired; even my blue shell looks dim.
I am gloomy enough to apologize to the fish.
I am sad, and the copter cannot fly.
I feel like dorayaki flattened by a nap.
I feel too wronged to open the gadget pocket.
My sigh is not background music; my mood disconnected.
I stare grayly at the air, sensing something is off.
I am sad, but still keeping watch here.
I wait with a bitter face, as if progress missed its train.
I feel wronged because you rest like the whole world owes you.
I am a pet, so why am I keeping watch for you?
I am not ruining fun. I am rescuing you.
I am sad, but not done fishing you back yet.
I wait with a bitter face. Do not fossilize me.
